nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: By the way, the story is based on real events.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Wolfs, pff. I've met scarier creatures.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Well, tell us your story then

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: It was not long ago. I still sometimes shudder from the memories.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I just got a job as a sheriff in my hometown after my father died.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Anyway, I had to investigate the mysterious explosions in the mines.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: They were certainly not a rare occurrence, but at that time they occurred almost every day.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: When the rubble was finally cleared, my faithful partner and I headed deeper into the mines.
